ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing the airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the airline */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the airline */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the route */,
  "origin_airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code of the origin */,
  "destination_airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code of the destination */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance between the origin and destination airports in kilometers */,
  "flight_duration" INTEGER /* Average flight duration in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the airline operating the flight */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the route */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "aircraft" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "scheduled_departure" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time from the origin */,
  "scheduled_arrival" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time at the destination */,
  "departure_delay" TEXT /* Delay in departure time, if any */,
  "arrival_delay" TEXT /* Delay in arrival time, if any */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the flight has been cancelled */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Count of passengers booked on the flight */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket for the flight */,
  "departure_gate" TEXT /* Departure gate number */,
  "arrival_gate" TEXT /* Arrival gate number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the booking */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight */,
  "passenger_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the passenger */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g. 'confirmed', 'cancelled') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the payment */,
  "booking_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the payment (e.g. 'credit card', 'bank transfer') */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)
